vertical.label: Pure Vertical Transfer
vertical.copy: Vertical mast transfer into the shell with balanced stance reaction.

pitch.label: Vertical Plus Pitch Moment
pitch.copy: Fore-aft bending couple around the mast that should favor a through-thickness insert path.

lateral.label: Vertical Plus Lateral Carve Load
lateral.copy: Asymmetric shell demand with rail loading and roll transfer.

impulse.label: Pump Impulse Envelope
impulse.copy: Higher transient envelope of the pitch case.
